channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canberra runner Cameron Myers breaks Australian U20 800m record in Germany
item.description: Canberra middle-distance runner Cameron Myers has continued his remarkable rise on the international athletics stage by breaking the Australian under-20 record in the 800 metres at the Lange Laufnacht...

item.title: One dead, eight injured after three-storey commercial building collapses near Saket Metro in Delhi
item.description: A three-storey commercial building collapsed near Saket Metro station in south Delhi on the evening of May 30, 2026, resulting in the death of a 26-year-old man and injuries to eight others. The incid...

item.title: Senate grants extension for Vice President Sara Duterte to file impeachment response until Monday
item.description: The Philippine Senate has allowed Vice President Sara Duterte additional time to submit her official answer in relation to an impeachment complaint, setting the new deadline until Monday. This develop...

item.title: San Antonio Spurs Defeat Thunder in Game 7 to Advance to NBA Finals
item.description: The San Antonio Spurs secured a 111-103 victory over the Oklahoma City Thunder in Game 7 of the Western Conference Finals, earning their first trip to the NBA Finals since 2014. Led by Victor Wembanya...

item.title: Lawsuit Filed After Child Contracts Severe E. coli Infection Linked to Kebab Shop Beef
item.description: A California family has filed a lawsuit against a kebab restaurant chain and its beef supplier after a child became seriously ill with an E. coli infection allegedly linked to beef kofta consumed at o...

item.title: Transgender athlete AB Hernandez wins two California state track titles in final high school meet
item.description: Transgender athlete AB Hernandez of Jurupa Valley High School concluded a highly-publicized high school track and field career at the 2026 California State Championships in Clovis. Hernandez secured f...

item.title: Arsenal urged to strengthen attack after Champions League final defeat to PSG
item.description: Arsenal’s defeat in the Champions League final has prompted renewed scrutiny of Mikel Arteta’s squad and the tactical direction of the team. Although the performance was largely disciplined and capabl...

item.title: Race-by-race preview and betting tips for Warren Monday meeting
item.description: This article provides a detailed race-by-race preview and betting guide for the Warren race meeting held on Monday, focusing on track conditions, key runners, and suggested selections. The track is ra...

item.title: Opposition leader says Tanzania still faces a long road toward full democratic governance
item.description: Tanzania’s political debate continues as opposition leader Freeman Mbowe has stated that the country is still far from achieving true democratic governance, noting that the journey remains long and fu...

item.title: Arteta calls for decisive action after Arsenal’s Champions League defeat
item.description: After Arsenal’s heartbreaking penalty loss to Paris St Germain in the Champions League final in Budapest, manager Mikel Arteta urged the club to act fast, smart and boldly in planning for the future. ...

item.title: WHO urges safe burials and faster response amid escalating Ebola outbreak in DRC
item.description: The Director-General of the World Health Organisation (WHO), Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, has visited the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) as authorities battle a rapidly growing Ebola outbreak i...

item.title: Investigation links funding source to private jet trip for Imogen Mashazi in 2022
item.description: The Sunday Times investigation traces the financial trail of a R3.35 million private jet charter tied to former Ekurhuleni city manager Imogen Mashazi’s 2022 trip to London. Central to the story is Ze...

item.title: India to set up Destination Management Organisations at major tourist sites to improve tourism ecosystem
item.description: The Union Tourism Minister Gajendra Singh Shekhawat has announced that the Government of India plans to establish Destination Management Organisations (DMOs) at key tourist sites across the country, w...

item.title: Arteta Comments on Massive Kenyan Support Ahead of Arsenal vs PSG Final
item.description: Ahead of the Champions League final, Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta expressed his gratitude for the overwhelming support the club has received from fans in Kenya. Nairobi and other Kenyan cities have be...

item.title: Palarong Pambansa 2026 concludes with closing ceremony in Agusan del Sur and turnover to Quezon City
item.description: The 66th Palarong Pambansa officially concluded on Sunday, May 31, 2026, with its closing ceremony held at the Datu Lipus Makapandong Cultural Center in Prosperidad, Agusan del Sur. The event gathered...

item.title: Supporters Protest Alleged Irregularities in APGA Oyi Constituency Primary Election in Anambra
item.description: There was tension on Friday at the Anambra State Government House in Awka when a large group of protesters from Oyi Local Government Area stormed the premises to challenge the outcome of the All Progr...

item.title: Nationals Overcome Padres with Late-Game Surge in 9-4 Victory
item.description: The Washington Nationals secured a 9-4 victory over the San Diego Padres on Saturday, thanks to a decisive sixth-run seventh inning. For the first six innings, Nationals batters carefully faced Padres...

item.title: From instability to structure: How Bafana Bafana evolved from 2002 turmoil to 2026 promise
item.description: Bafana Bafana’s journey to the 2026 FIFA World Cup stands in sharp contrast to the instability that defined their 2002 campaign. In the early 2000s, South Africa’s national team faced significant orga...

item.title: Letters Discuss Leadership Options, Governance, and Local Concerns in Canada
item.description: The Globe and Mail's Letters to the Editor on May 31 covered a range of issues affecting Canadians. One letter highlights the potential for a new leadership option for Conservative supporters, pointin...

item.title: Canberra Raiders defeat Cowboys in milestone match but suffer injury concerns
item.description: The Canberra Raiders secured an important 26-12 victory over the North Queensland Cowboys in a match that strengthened their push for a top-eight finish in the NRL, but the result may have been oversh...
